name: python3-logutils
title: python3-logutils
summary: handlers for the Python standard library's logging package - Python 3.x
description:
handlers for the Python standard library's logging package - Python 3.x
The logutils package provides a set of handlers for the Python standard
library's logging package.
.
Some of these handlers are out-of-scope for the standard library, and so they
are packaged here. Others are updated versions which have appeared in recent
Python releases, but are usable with older versions of Python and so are
packaged here.
.
This package contains the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-logutils because handlers for the Python standard library's logging package - Python 3.x.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-logutils as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-logutils with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-logutils --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
